title: Sodium Butyrate Exacerbates Parkinson's Disease by Aggravating Neuroinflammation and Colonic Inflammation in MPTP-Induced Mice Model
mechanism_tags: astrocyte activation; microglial activation; pro-inflammatory markers
summary: Sodium butyrate exacerbates neuroinflammation in MPTP-induced Parkinson's disease mice model, increasing microglial and astrocyte activation and pro-inflammatory markers such as IL-1β, IL-18, iNOS, and nitric oxide.
why_it_matters: Negative Parkinson/MPTP outlier; strongest anti-butyrate signal in corpus.

title: Sodium butyrate ameliorates the impairment of synaptic plasticity by inhibiting the neuroinflammation in 5XFAD mice
summary: Sodium butyrate decreased neuroinflammation in 5XFAD mice.
why_it_matters: Positive AD/5XFAD signal; direct anti-neuroinflammatory framing.

title: Sodium Butyrate Supplementation Modulates Neuroinflammatory Response Aggravated by Antibiotic Treatment in a Mouse Model of Binge-like Ethanol Drinking
model_system: mouse model of binge-like ethanol drinking
summary: Sodium butyrate supplementation decreased neuroinflammatory response in mice with ethanol-induced inflammation, even when gut dysbiosis was worsened by antibiotics.
why_it_matters: Positive ethanol+broad dysbiosis context; gut-brain interpretation explicit.

title: Butyrate ameliorates chronic alcoholic central nervous damage by suppressing microglia-mediated neuroinflammation and modulating the microbiome-gut-brain axis
administration_route: oral or systemic (implied by study context)
mechanism_tags: gpr109a activation; microglia-mediated; ppar-γ increase; tlr4/nf-κb signaling downregulation
summary: Sodium butyrate decreased neuroinflammation in chronic alcohol-exposed mice.
why_it_matters: Positive chronic alcohol context with barrier and microglia story.

title: Sodium butyrate alleviates lead-induced neuroinflammation and improves cognitive and memory impairment through the ACSS2/H3K9ac/BDNF pathway
why_it_matters: Positive toxic-exposure rescue context; relevant but somewhat peripheral to gut-brain core.

title: Sodium butyrate attenuates microglia-mediated neuroinflammation by modulating the TLR4/MyD88/NF-κB pathway and microbiome-gut-brain axis in cardiac arrest mice
summary: Sodium butyrate attenuates microglia-mediated neuroinflammation in cardiac arrest mice.
why_it_matters: Positive acute-injury/cardiac-arrest context with microglia and TLR4/MyD88/NF-kB story.
